summary: Comprehensive testing of new subscription modal feature for free watches (Basic, J, S). All 12 features tested successfully. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (subscription and full_payment checkout for all products). Frontend: Subscription modal appears correctly for Basic/J/S with dynamic product name and shipping cost, but does NOT appear for Fundadores/Premium (goes directly to Stripe). SentinelJ and SentinelS pages have CTA buttons linking to /sentinel-x#reservar with 'GRATIS' text.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Sentinel X page loads with promo banner (data-testid: promo-banner-free)
TEST 3: All 3 model cards visible (model-basic, model-fundadores, model-premium)
TEST 4: Order form visible with 5 product selection options (Basic, Fundadores, Premium, J, S)
TEST 5: Subscription modal appears when selecting Basic and submitting form (data-testid: subscription-modal)
TEST 6: Modal shows two plans: Mensual (9,99€) and Anual (99,99€) with MEJOR PRECIO badge
TEST 7: Modal shows correct product name 'Sentinel X Basic' with 9,95€ shipping
TEST 8: Modal shows correct product name 'Sentinel J' with 4,95€ shipping when selecting J
TEST 9: Modal shows correct product name 'Sentinel S' with 4,95€ shipping when selecting S
TEST 10: Fundadores does NOT show subscription modal - goes directly to Stripe checkout
TEST 11: Premium does NOT show subscription modal - goes directly to Stripe checkout
TEST 12: SentinelJ page CTA buttons say 'Reservar Sentinel J – GRATIS' and link to /sentinel-x#reservar
TEST 13: SentinelS page CTA buttons say 'RESERVAR GRATIS' and link to /sentinel-x#reservar
TEST 14: POST /api/checkout/sentinel-x with paymentType='subscription' returns valid Stripe checkout URL
TEST 15: POST /api/checkout/sentinel-x with paymentType='full_payment' returns valid Stripe checkout URL
TEST 16: Regression - Home page (/) loads correctly with ManoProtect branding
context_for_next_testing_agent: New subscription modal feature fully tested. Key data-testid attributes: subscription-modal, close-subscription-modal, plan-mensual, plan-anual, confirm-subscription, purchase-section, submit-preorder, select-sentinel-x-basic, select-sentinel-x-fundadores, select-sentinel-x-premium, select-sentinel-j, select-sentinel-s. Modal props: productName changes based on selection (Sentinel X Basic/Sentinel J/Sentinel S), shippingCost is 9,95 for Basic, 4,95 for J/S. Backend handles paymentType='subscription' for free watches and paymentType='full_payment' for paid watches (Fundadores/Premium). Using real Stripe API (not mocked).

backend_checkout.subscription_mode: Works for Basic/J/S - creates Stripe subscription checkout
backend_checkout.full_payment_mode: Works for Fundadores/Premium - creates Stripe one-time payment checkout
